title: UDS Component Changelog
description: Per-component changelog. Source of truth — release.sh aggregates these into uds/CHANGELOG.json. Lives at uds/components/<id>/changelog.json.

addedIn.description: UDS version this component first appeared in. Cross-validated against status.json.history[0].version.

entries.description: All changes ever, oldest first (matches global CHANGELOG convention).

version.description: UDS version this entry was shipped in.
